World.title: Trump says US will not lift Hormuz blockade until deal made with Iran
World.desc: The US president's comments come amid uncertainty over whether Iran will attend peace talks in Pakistan this week.

World.desc: This clears the way for Japan to sell weapons to more than a dozen countries.

World.desc: Prosecutors say the singer, real name David Anthony Burke, could face life in prison due to the nature of the case, if convicted.
